metadata.title: Toy Store | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered toy store management platform for all your retail operations — from point of sale and inventory management to loyalty programs and multi-channel sales.

hero.title: Toy Store
hero.description: AdonERP allows you to maximize sales across multiple channels, manage inventory, track purchases, and run your toy store from one platform.
hero.testimonialQuote: Working with AdonERP allowed us to digitize all our internal processes. We were able to be more efficient and finally reach full traceability on our products lifecycle.

productsSection.description: Product configuration, stock tracking, purchasing and sales tools keep your toy inventory easy to manage.

rewardsSection.title: Game-changing
rewardsSection.description: Reward your customers with coupons, loyalty cards, promotions, gift cards and eWallet options. Keep them coming back for more toys.

onlineStoreSection.title: Building blocks to
onlineStoreSection.description: Use ready-made website blocks to create a beautiful toy store online and sell through ecommerce. No coding required.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Everything you need to run toy sales, stock management, payments, and online orders from one platform.

list.title: All devices welcome
list.description: Works perfectly on tablets, laptops, desktops, and industrial scanners.

list.title: Website domain name
list.description: Get a professional domain name included with your online store.

list.title: Multiple cashiers
list.description: Manage several cashier accounts with badges or PIN codes.

list.title: Click and collect
list.description: Let customers shop online and pick up orders at your store.

list.title: All payment methods
list.description: Accept cash, cards, e-wallets, and contactless payments.

list.title: Shipping integration
list.description: Connect with major carriers for seamless delivery management.

list.title: Physical inventory
list.description: Conduct cycle counts and full inventory audits with ease.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your toy retail operation, finance, supplier flows, and customer communication.

testimonials.name: Emma Watson
testimonials.content: Working with AdonERP allowed us to digitize all our internal processes. We were able to be more efficient and finally reach full traceability on our products lifecycle.

testimonials.name: James Wilson
testimonials.content: The intuitive POS and multi-channel capabilities transformed our toy store. Our team mastered it in minutes and sales have never been better.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for toy retailers.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a toy store workflow that helps your team sell faster, manage inventory smarter, and create magical shopping experiences.
